text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm Sakura Chiyono O! Um, it's my pleasure to be
working with you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I really look up to Maruzen, and sometimes I
actually entertain the thought of competing
against her someday...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And "good things come to those at the gate"! So
I'll do my very best to get there myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
